{"steps": [{"title": "What is Boiling Point?", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.25, "image_description": null, "lang": "en-US", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "The **boiling point** is the temperature where a liquid turns into a gas (vapor).", "highlight": ["boiling point"], "speech": "Imagine heating up water. The boiling point is that special temperature when the water starts to bubble and turn into steam!", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "It's a **physical property**: something we can measure without changing the substance itself.", "highlight": ["physical property"], "speech": "A physical property is like the color of a crayon or how heavy a rock is. We can observe it without destroying the crayon or rock!", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}, {"title": "Identifying Substances", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.0, "image_description": null, "lang": "en-US", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Every pure **substance** has its own unique boiling point.", "highlight": ["substance"], "speech": "Think of it like a fingerprint! Pure water always boils at the same temperature, and so does pure alcohol, but at a different temperature.", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "quiz_mcq", "text": "Which of these is a unique physical property for identifying a pure substance?", "highlight": [], "speech": "We just learned that different substances have different fingerprints. Which of these options is a unique property we can use to identify them?", "duration_ms": 4000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": ["Color", "Boiling Point", "Shape", "Size"], "quiz_correct_index": 1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "We can measure the boiling point to know **what substance** we have.", "highlight": ["what substance"], "speech": "If we measure a liquid's boiling point and it matches the known boiling point of, say, saltwater, then we know it's saltwater!", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}, {"title": "Controlling Processes", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.0, "image_description": null, "lang": "en-US", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Knowing the boiling point helps us **control processes** like cooking or making things.", "highlight": ["control processes"], "speech": "When you cook pasta, you boil water. Knowing the boiling point of water helps you make sure it's hot enough to cook the pasta perfectly!", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "quiz_fill", "text": "The **boiling point** is a **physical property** used for **substance identification** and **process control**.", "highlight": ["boiling point", "physical property", "substance identification", "process control"], "speech": "Let's fill in the blanks to summarize what we've learned. What is the temperature called where a liquid turns into a gas? What kind of property is it? What two main things does it help us do?", "duration_ms": 5000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "The boiling point is a physical property used for substance identification and process control.", "quiz_keywords": ["boiling point", "physical property", "substance identification", "process control"], "fill_blanks": ["boiling point", "physical property", "substance identification", "process control"], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}, {"title": "Lesson Recap", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.0, "image_description": null, "lang": "en-US", "frames": [{"frame_type": "summary", "text": "* **Boiling point** is the temp a liquid becomes gas.
* It's a **physical property**.
* Helps **identify substances**.
* Used to **control processes**.", "highlight": ["Boiling point", "physical property", "identify substances", "control processes"], "speech": "So, to wrap it all up, the boiling point is a super useful physical property that helps us figure out what stuff is and how to use it in different processes!", "duration_ms": 4000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}]}
